codeReview.summary: The implementation successfully adds 5 CLI-to-server alignment tests that verify `resolveIssueExecutionPacketTruth` correctly parses `artifactKind` from CLI-emitted description strings. The tests use the actual CLI format as emitted by `buildTriadDescription` in the CLI package, providing end-to-end verification of the alignment between CLI inference and server parsing.

summary: Feature packet-truth-server-alignment-test passes review. The 5 new test cases (doc_update, config_change, multi_file_change, code_patch, test_update) correctly verify that the server parses all artifact kinds from CLI-emitted descriptions. Tests pass (10 total), typecheck passes. Implementation is minimal, focused, and meets all expected behaviors specified in the feature description.
